overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a rooftop at dusk. The character walks from an area with illuminated planters toward the roof edge, engaging in dialogue, and approaches a binocular viewer overlooking a sprawling futuristic cityscape with atmospheric haze and scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop deck with illuminated planters and light poles

events.description: dialogue option appears on screen initiating conversation about Santo Domingo

agents.ego_description: character standing near the light poles then beginning to walk toward the roof edge

entered.detail: tall modern street lamps with rectangular planters at base containing small trees
dense futuristic cityscape with numerous high-rise buildings and scattered lights against the dusk sky
flat concrete rooftop with scattered debris and papers
tall thin trees growing in the rectangular planters near the light poles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rooftop at dusk with the player character near modern light poles and planters. Dialogue options appear on screen as the character begins moving. The city skyline stretches across the background under a cloudy sky, with artificial lights beginning to illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop walkway along parapet edge with city overlook

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking steadily along the rooftop edge

agents.ego_description: character walking along the concrete parapet wall toward the binocular viewer at the roof edge

entered.detail: low concrete wall marking the edge of the rooftop with metal fixtures
coin-operated observation binoculars mounted on a pedestal at the roof edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the rooftop edge, leaving the light poles behind. The concrete parapet wall runs along the left side as the character approaches a binocular viewer in the distance. The city skyline becomes more prominent as the camera moves closer to the edge, with the dialogue options remaining visible on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation point with binocular viewer overlooking cityscape

events.description: character approaches the binocular viewer and the camera shifts to focus on the city overlook

agents.ego_description: character stopping at the roof edge near the binocular viewer to look out over the city

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the binocular viewer at the roof edge, with the camera moving closer to show the detailed cityscape view. The viewer becomes prominent in the foreground as the camera pans to reveal the sprawling city below with its lights twinkling in the dusk haze. The concrete parapet remains visible along the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rooftop at dusk that transitions from a sheltered terrace into a panoramic vista of a futuristic metropolis. It begins near modern light poles and illuminated planters, with dialogue options appearing on screen as the character starts to move against a backdrop of a cloudy sky. As the character walks forward, the scene shifts away from the lighting fixtures toward the roof's edge, where a concrete parapet wall guides the camera's path. The perspective then expands as the character approaches a binocular viewer, bringing the sprawling city skyline into sharper focus. Finally, the camera pans to reveal the vast urban expanse below, with twinkling lights emerging through the dusk haze as the viewer becomes prominent in the foreground.
